creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Christopher from comment #9)
> $ pkg info '*python*'
> py27-dnspython-1.16.0
> py27-python-distutils-extra-2.39
> python27-2.7.16_1
> python36-3.6.8_2
> 
> $ pkg which /usr/local/bin/python
> /usr/local/bin/python was not found in the database

Maybe I start to see what could be the problem.

Let me perform some extra tests.
